@startuml
abstract class Tetromino {
  # colour: Tetromino.Colour
  + Tetromino(Tetromino.Colour, TetroMatrix, TetroMatrix, TetroMatrix, TetroMatrix)
  + nextRow(): TetroArray
  + leftmostRow(): TetroArray
  + rightmostRow(): TetroArray
  + resetRow(): void
  + resetOrientation(): void
  + reset(): void
  + rotateCW(): void
  + rotateCCW(): void
}
@enduml
